experiment_title: FeCl₃与FeCl₂溶液分别与KSCN反应的对比实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="FeCl₃与FeCl₂溶液分别与KSCN反应的对比实验" goal="比较FeCl₃和FeCl₂溶液与KSCN溶液反应时的颜色变化，观察Fe³⁺与SCN⁻反应生成血红色络合物的现象。" difficulty="Easy" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_rack" type="test_tube_rack" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="dropper" type="dropper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="FeCl3_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="FeCl2_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="KSCN_solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_rack" id="step_0" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_2" support="test_tube_rack" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="FeCl3" volume="2 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="FeCl2" volume="2 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="KSCN" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="KSCN" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_6" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 准备实验器材，将两支试管分别放入试管架。
分别向两支试管中加入FeCl₃溶液和FeCl₂溶液，然后分别加入KSCN溶液。
等待反应发生，观察颜色变化以比较Fe³⁺与SCN⁻反应生成血红色络合物的现象。
